nodes.context: International confraternity established in 1977 at University of Benin, Nigeria, as part of Pan-African movement.
Criminal subgroup of the Neo Black Movement of Africa, formed in 1994.
Similar group established in 1952, to which NBM formed as a response.

edges.evidence_quote: In February 2024, the Neo Black Movement of Africa publicly disassociated itself from the Black Axe, a criminal subgroup of the confraternity that formed in 1994.
edges.context: Black Axe is a criminal subgroup of NBM, but NBM publicly disassociated from it in 2024.

edges.evidence_quote: The NBM formed as a response to the reported excesses of National Association of Seadogs (Pyrates), a similar group established in 1952.
edges.context: NBM was formed in response to the excesses of the National Association of Seadogs.
